---
description: Canonical verbatim content for a repository's SECURITY.md.
applyTo: 'SECURITY.md'
---
# SECURITY.md — Canonical Content

`SECURITY.md` is identical across every repo in this organization. When creating or updating, replace the file content with the following **verbatim** text (no additions, no per-repo customisation):

```markdown
# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

This is a learning and development project, as such there is no direct support given for external users.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

I encourage any and all security vulnerabilities to be reported to `security@mx-mail.io` or by opening an issue through GitHub.
```

## Compliance check

A `SECURITY.md` is compliant when its full content matches the block above byte-for-byte (a single trailing newline is acceptable). Any deviation should be replaced.
